_comment: LCSC part assignments for JLCPCB PCBA, keyed by KiCad footprint name (the 'Package' column from `kicad-cli pcb export pos`). scripts/gen-jlcpcb-bom-cpl.py joins this against the position file to emit BOM/CPL. See v4/README.md 'How parts are assigned' for the full rules.

diode_tht_sod123.note: ST(Semtech) 1N4148W. Set rotation to match diode polarity in DFM. Tier/alternates: see v4/README.md BOM.

R_0805.note: UNI-ROYAL 0805W8F1000T5E, 100R 0805 1%. Non-polar, so rotation is irrelevant. Tier/alternates: see v4/README.md BOM.

D_SOD-123FL.note: Littelfuse SMF5.0CA. Bidirectional, so rotation is irrelevant. Tier/stock/alternates: see v4/README.md BOM.
